business.name: La Peñita Restaurante y Taquería
business.tagline: Family-owned Plano taquería serving real Mexican street food since 2003.

payments.notes: Client-owned Stripe Payment Links ONLY (https://buy.stripe.com/...). Card data flows to Stripe, never to this site or the agency. Empty tokens are stripped in client builds and forced to '#' in demo builds. See docs/STRIPE_SETUP.md.

meta.notes: All branding (colors, fonts) lives in assets/css/custom.css as CSS custom properties.
meta.placeholderPhone: (469) 000-0000 is a PLACEHOLDER. The real number is unverified — cross-listed as (469) 467-6595 but do a live Google check before dialing/launch, then replace every (469) 000-0000 across the HTML + this config.
meta.addressNote: Located inside Plano Bazaar on Jupiter Rd, Plano TX 75074; exact suite unconfirmed (listings show 1424 Jupiter Rd Ste 203 vs 1409 Jupiter Rd Ste 220). Confirm suite before launch.
